title: Frost's rose gold mod
description: Another mod that adds rose gold, a level between iron and diamond, alongside some new uses for amethyst.
body:
A Rose Gold mod i made because I couldn't get a working Rose Gold mod for the version i was playing. lol. Made with MCreator 

This mod's primary purpose is to add Rose gold, a stage of armor and tools between diamond and iron, but adds some other misc things as well.

Dark Copper
Made with 3 copper ingots, it's one of the main ingredients in rose gold. It can also be used to craft a lot of decorative blocks similar to copper, and can be used to craft some unique food items, that being purified flesh and purified eyes.

More uses for Amethyst
Amethyst has a handful of new uses. It can be used to Upgrade shears and fishing rods, giving them more durability. Alongside that, it can also be used to craft Amethyst arrowheads and Amethyst feathers to allow for arrows to be crafted easier. finally it can be used to craft Jewel berries, a new food item made from sweet berries and, of course, amethyst.
